VW CarNet module 75 emergency call module and communication unit is "faulty needs replaced". DTC is B20004B and DTC B14D796 "internal malfunction of the module. Needs replaced."  I own 3 VWs and this Module keep failing in our VWs this is major Safty concern for me and my Family

narrative.headline: What 2024 Volkswagen Taos owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 46 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Service Brakes (30% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
